title: Elden Witchcraft
description: A fantasy modpack for coop play, exploration and combat in a magical and challenging world. Inspired by The Witcher and Dungeons & Dragons.
body:
![Elden Witchcraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf04a020522bf024eb9d6c837fcc90a73e4f021a.png)

A **fantasy** modpack for coop play, focused on exploration and combat with **RPG classes**, taking inspiration from **The Witcher** and **Dungeons & Dragons**. Step into a world filled with new adventures and challenging enemies.

Elden Witchcraft  includes several new items, mechanics and structures for your adventures.
Some of the included mods are (for a full list, look at the Changelog):
- Class system, skills, and spells (**RPG Series**, **More RPG Series**)
- More pillager structures and new enemies. Guarded caravans with valuable loot roam around the world (**It Takes a Pillage Continuation**, **Pillager Caravans**)
- Improved combat mechanics and weapons for challenging battles (**Better Combat**, **Combat Roll**)
- Powerful artifacts and treasures with stat buffs (**Relics**, **Jewelry**)
- Atmospheric dungeons and structures around the world (**Trek**, **Moog's Voyager Structures**)
- More foods and beverages with new mechanics (**Farmer's Delight**, **Brewin' and Chewin'**)

![A villager fort](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1eb5e2e89b7b91299d23a08b20fc167385c86130.jpeg)

## Your New Adventure ⚔️

> Join your friends and take on monsters and enemies, conquering incredible magic powers!

- 🥋 **Choose a Role**: pick a class that fits your preferred combat style. Warriors excel in melee and heavy armor, Rogues prefer agile and quick attacks, Archers master ranged damage with bows, Witchers specialize in monster hunting with signs and adrenaline build-up, Wizards and Priests wield offensive and supportive spells, while Paladins pair high damage with healing capabilities.

- 🏞️ **Explore Dangerous Lands**: the world is packed with varied landmarks - forts bristling with pillagers, ruined towers sheltering cultists, crypts that whisper of old gods. Many structures contain unique mechanics and challenging enemies.

- 🏗️ **Build & Customize**: create your homehold, craft class gear and acquire relics. Amulets and spellbooks let you tailor your abilities to your playstyle.

- 🏅 **Rewarding Progression**: leveling unlocks new powers and abilities. Your build choices influence combat tactics and problem solving, there’s no single best path.

- 🍻 **Join Friends**: play coop with your friends, benefit from different classes playing together in synergy. Share a beer between battles!

## Roleplay Classes 🏹

> Pick a class by acquiring its unique gear, spell book and skill tree

Roleplay classes with unique armors and weapons, including **Warrior**, **Witcher**, **Paladin**, **Wizard**, **Rogue**, **Priest** and **Archer**. Each class comes with several new items and powers.

![A Witcher hideout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09c440f8a12557a2b2f7877014070e898f21e7f_0.webp)

![The Wizard class (Arcane variant)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed31146fbfe09342e1e865cae96f3b4839474418.jpeg)

## Magic System ✨

> Create your class' spell book to unlock spells as you progress

A simple but powerful **magic system** with different spells for every build. Level up and gain incredible powers! You can also acquire magic amulets and other buffs to take on more powerful foes. To start using magic spells, create a **Spell Book** using a **Spell Binding Table** and equip a weapon that casts spells.

![Arcane spell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31c5157e636cb09ed3a54a113e13f3d08d5bc2af.jpeg)

## Exploration 🏛️

> Explore castles and forts, magical structures and mysterious dungeons.

Several new structures with a fantasy theme and interesting loot await you on your journey. Attack them for loot, or make them your new home!

![A small fantasy village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f8b6ab0682268e5da310cba3fb84be4824bb64e.jpeg)

![A mushroom island!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98e911dd43cd743895e1f45cb3fe9e578951664b.jpeg)

## Adventure ☠️

> Pillagers are taking over the world with violent raids!

Challenging battles to take over pillager forts, with new enemies and structures. Pillagers attack villages and move their loot with caravans.

![A spooky encounter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/312d3b5955bbd6dfd5751b8eb36c872be55f3eea_0.webp)

![Pillager caravan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0720725b125ddc2a7f371a71d6fae3bd480fb364_0.webp)

## Roadmap
These are some of the features which will be explored in the next updates:
- Unique quests and book guides with light lore
- New skill trees
- New monstrous and magical mobs
- End overhaul
- Tweak loot tables, worldgen and difficulty

## Credits
This modpack was made possible by the RPG Series mods and their extensions.
We are grateful to all the developers of the mods included in this modpack, look at the Changelog page for a full list. Screenshots were made using Iris Shaders, Visual Vibrance and Complementary Unbound.
